title: Akane-banashi Anime Announces 5 More Cast Members
content: The staff of the anime of writer Yūki Suenaga and illustrator Takamasa Moue 's Akane-banashi manga announced five more cast members this weekend. The staff also began streaming the anime's opening sequence without onscreen credits: The newly announced cast members are: • Fumihiko Tachiki as Zenshō Arakawa • Hiroaki…
author: ANN

title: After 17 Years, A Legendary Shonen Returns With New Anime Surprise
content: Warning! Massive spoilers for Fire Force’s final episode to follow! 17 long years after it ended its original run , a legendary Shonen anime has made its comeback with a surprising anime return hidden in another Shonen franchise’s grand finale.
author: ComicBook

title: Studio Laika Unveils Stop-Motion Crossover
content: For over twenty years, Laika has been considered by many to be the premier studio responsible for creating the biggest stop-motion animation movies in recent memory. To date, the production house has made critically acclaimed films such as Coraline, The Boxtrolls, Paranorman, Kubo And The Two Strings , and Missing…
author: ComicBook

title: My Hero Academia Creator Returns With New Art Ahead of Anime’s Real Finale
content: My Hero Academia is commemorating the 10th anniversary of its original anime debut , and the creator behind it all has returned to celebrate with some cool new art ahead of the anime’s real grand finale.
author: ComicBook

title: Bleach Gives Fans a Gift To Prepare For The Thousand-Year Blood War’s End
content: This summer, the grand finale for Ichigo Kurosaki and the Soul Society is preparing to air as Bleach: The Thousand-Year Blood War – The Calamity will arrive. Adapting the final major arc from creator Tite Kubo, Studio Pierrot will forge the story of the Shinigami taking on Yhwach and the Sternritter for the final…
author: ComicBook

title: JoJo’s Bizarre Adventure: Major Company Asks Netflix For Steel Ball Run Episode 2
content: As the kids say these days, JoJo’s Bizarre Adventure: Steel Ball Run has “broken containment.” For years, many Joestar enthusiasts have been waiting to see the cross-country race featuring the likes of Johnny Joestar, Gyro Zeppelli, and the other racers looking to make their dreams come true.
author: ComicBook

title: Let Me Fix You Yuri Manga Gets Short Anime
content: German publisher Dokico announced on Saturday that Sakura Kurihara 's Let Me Fix You ( Kimi o Tsumugu ) yuri manga is getting a short anime. The anime will stream on YouTube in late May. Dokico is contributing to the project in collaboration with Europe-based animation studio Buta Productions .
author: ANN

title: Scum of the Brave Anime's New Video Unveils More Cast, New Theme Songs
content: The staff for the television anime of writer Rocket Shokai and artist Nakashima723 's Scum of the Brave ( Yūsha no Kuzu ) manga presented its third main promotional video and third main visual on Saturday.
author: ANN

title: 'Akane-banashi' Announces Additional Cast Pair
content: The official X (formally Twitter) of the Akane-banashi television anime revealed an additional pair of cast on Saturday. The anime series adapting Yuuki Suenaga and Takamasa Moue 's drama performance arts manga will begin airing on TV Asahi's IMAnimation programming block, followed by BS Asahi and AT-X at 11.30 p.m.
author: MyAnimeList

title: Yumi's Cells Webtoon to Receive 1st Stage Musical Adaptation
content: A stage musical adaptation of the webtoon Yumi's Cells will premiere on June 30, running through August 23 at the CJ Towol Theater in Seoul's Arts Center. The production is being staged by SEM Company and Studio N , a subsidiary of Naver Webtoon focused on adaptations.
author: ANN
